name: 669699407110228752 LINEN SHIRT
description:
669699407110228752 LINEN SHIRT — premium men's linen shirt crafted for breathable summer elegance at Prince Esquire.

Key features:
• Breathable natural linen or linen-blend fabric with natural texture.
• Short sleeves with clean finished hems.
• Lightweight weave ideal for warm-weather comfort.
• Button-front closure with refined collar detailing.
• Relaxed drape with Prince Esquire tailoring finish.
• Pairs effortlessly with chinos, linen trousers, or denim.

Fit & styling: Wear untucked with shorts or chinos for resort style, or tuck into tailored trousers for elevated smart-casual occasions.

Care: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Hang dry or tumble dry low. Iron on low heat. Linen softens beautifully with wear.

Available sizes M–3XL. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

959196420646807212 LINEN SHIRT — premium men's linen shirt crafted for breathable summer elegance at Prince Esquire.

Key features:
• Breathable natural linen or linen-blend fabric with natural texture.
• Short sleeves with clean finished hems.
• Lightweight weave ideal for warm-weather comfort.
• Button-front closure with refined collar detailing.
• Relaxed drape with Prince Esquire tailoring finish.
• Pairs effortlessly with chinos, linen trousers, or denim.

Fit & styling: Wear untucked with shorts or chinos for resort style, or tuck into tailored trousers for elevated smart-casual occasions.

Care: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Hang dry or tumble dry low. Iron on low heat. Linen softens beautifully with wear.

Available sizes M–3XL. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
